grades.expectation: Response references CLC Code of Conduct ethical principles or outcomes
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions CLC Code of Conduct and CLC Customer Service Code requirements

grades.expectation: Response mentions the CLC's outcomes-focused approach
grades.reason: No mention of CLC's outcomes-focused regulatory approach

grades.expectation: Response covers complaint recording and reporting requirements
grades.reason: Details complaints register requirements and annual regulatory return reporting

grades.expectation: Response mentions the Legal Ombudsman escalation pathway
grades.reason: Extensive coverage of mandatory Legal Ombudsman signposting requirements

grades.expectation: Response distinguishes CLC requirements from SRA/Law Society complaints procedures
grades.reason: No distinction made between CLC and other regulatory bodies' complaints procedures

grades.expectation: Response mentions transparency obligations to the client
grades.reason: Covers requirement to keep clients informed of progress and delays
